perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The main female character with pigtails wears a striped long-sleeve shirt and high-waisted denim overalls in an office hallway. (2) She transitions to Day 2 in a white sweater and midi skirt, showing off colorful polka-dot shoes in a creative workshop. (3) Day 3 shows her from a back-view perspective working at a cluttered desk in an office. (4) Day 4 features her in a tan trench coat over a green dress in a studio setting with a white cutout frame. (5) Day 5 takes place in a modern kitchen where she wears a white puffed-sleeve dress and a yellow knit vest, spinning playfully. (6) Day 6 shows her in a bathroom/dressing room area wearing a black long dress and white utility vest. (7) Finally, on Day 7, she is in an office with white cabinets, wearing a white overall dress over the striped shirt from Day 1, talking directly to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice announces the start of a 7-day challenge. (2) As the visuals cut between days, the music remains continuous. A male voice is heard off-camera laughing and calling out a 'foul' regarding her shoes. (3) The female voice continues narrating her experience, maintaining a friendly and humorous tone. Sound effects (SFX) such as 'ding' or 'pop' coincide with text appearances. (4) The background music concludes as the female voice summarizes her feelings about her wardrobe in a more reflective but still cheerful tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '穿不是Hahahababy的第一天' (Day 1 of not wearing Hahahababy) - Setting the challenge theme. (2) Decorative Hook: '我要挑戰七天 第一天' (I'm going to challenge 7 days, Day 1) - Highly energetic. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '但是你的鞋子 犯規!!' (But your shoes, foul!!) - Humorous variety-show style caption. (4) Functional Text: '第二天', '第三天', '第四天', '第五天', '第六天', '最後一天' - Chronological day markers. (5) Decorative Hook: '買了衣服要認真穿' (If you buy clothes, wear them seriously) - Emotional takeaway. (6) Decorative/Effect Text: '終於完成' (Finally finished) - Celebrating the end of the challenge.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 female colleagues in background, 2 male passers-by in various scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian woman with a youthful appearance, often styling her hair in pigtails or a bun, wearing various 'mori-girl' or quirky fashion-style layered outfits.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A mix of professional and domestic interiors: an office hallway with glass doors, a workshop with crafting materials, a minimalist kitchen with a white fridge, and a bright studio space.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting and natural office light.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut between narration clips over a continuous music bed.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle and fashion challenge vlog. The creator challenges herself to wear clothes other than her usual brand (Hahahababy) for seven days. The objective is to engage her audience through a relatable wardrobe struggle ('having too many clothes but wearing the same ones') while subtly promoting her fashion taste and the mentioned brand by keeping it at the center of the conversation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The repeated mention of 'Hahahababy' in both text and speech, combined with the creator's apparent association with the brand's style.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The pigtail hairstyle and the specific mention of the brand Hahahababy.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a popular '7-day challenge' format common among fashion influencers to drive engagement and show variety in outfit coordination.
